title: Home
text:
Mechanical Fluids Engineering Graduate | Hydrology, Hydraulics and Water Resources
I am a Mechanical Fluids Engineer from Peru working in hydrology, hydraulics and environmental data analysis. My research focuses on hydrological modelling, precipitation analysis, uncertainty assessment and data-driven approaches for water resources applications.
This website contains my publications, research projects, technical notes and reproducible workflows related to hydrology and environmental data science.



Hydrological modelling
Extreme rainfall and flood analysis
Satellite precipitation products
Hydrological uncertainty
Environmental data science
Reproducible workflows in R and Quarto






Assessment of uncertainty propagation from indirect IDF methods into peak discharge estimation in ungauged coastal catchments.



Evaluation of how streamflow reconstruction methods affect annual water balance estimates and hydrological indicators.



Comparison of machine learning and traditional approaches for streamflow prediction using open precipitation datasets.

title: About
text:
I am a Mechanical Fluids Engineer from Peru working in hydrology, hydraulics and water resources analysis.
My work combines hydrological modelling, precipitation analysis, uncertainty assessment and data-driven methods to support water resources studies and environmental decision-making.
This website serves as a repository for publications, research projects, technical notes and reproducible workflows related to hydrology and environmental data science.

title: About
text:
Research Interests

Hydrology and water resources
Hydrological modelling
Hydrological frequency analysis
Extreme rainfall and flood analysis
Satellite precipitation products
Hydrological uncertainty
Environmental data science
Reproducible research with R and Quarto

text:
Contact
You can find my publications, projects and professional profiles through the links available on this website.

title: Curriculum Vitae
text:
Mechanical Fluids Engineering Graduate


Mechanical Fluids Engineer with experience in hydrology, hydraulics and water resources analysis. Author and co-author of peer-reviewed publications in hydrology and environmental sciences. Experienced in hydrological modelling, precipitation analysis, uncertainty assessment and reproducible scientific workflows.



National University of San Marcos (UNMSM)
B.Sc. in Mechanical Fluids Engineering
Lima, Peru
2022





Engineering Assistant
December 2022 – Present

Support hydrological and hydraulic studies for water resources projects.
Perform hydrological analyses and hydraulic calculations.
Process and analyze environmental and engineering datasets.
Prepare technical reports and engineering documentation.




GIS and Database Assistant
September 2021 – December 2021

Conducted field data collection and survey activities.
Organized, processed and systematized spatial and tabular datasets.
Supported GIS-based data management and reporting tasks.
Assisted in database development and information management.







Berrocal, B. F., & Ramirez, J. I. (2026).
Bias correction and statistical transfer of satellite annual maximum precipitation series in the Piura River.
Ingeniería del Agua.

Tecnología y Ciencias del Agua.
DOI: https://doi.org/10.24850/j-tyca-18-02-02
